summary: Tested Pillar 19 Comparative IRAC — Jurisdictional Heat Map and Query Expansion features. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified with Playwright. Heat map renders correctly with colored badges, print button works, summary verdict displays, IRAC cards and synthesis all functional.
critical_code_review_comments: _is_relevant() function is duplicated in comparative_service.py (defined twice at lines ~225 and ~334) — minor code quality issue, no functional impact
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both new features fully tested: (1) heat_map returns dimensions, cells (full|partial|none|indeterminate), summary_verdict; (2) query expansion works for erga omnes — no bare indeterminate conclusions. Frontend shows colored badges (green=full, amber=partial, red=none, gray=?), Brief print button clickable, summary verdict visible. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_comparative_heatmap.py can be reused as regression.
